Allure Winner
Each year, thousands of products are tested by Allure beauty editors and a panel of industry experts, including makeup artists, hairstylists, and dermatologists. When you see the Allure Best of Beauty seal, it means that a product has been rigorously tested and identified as exceptional in its category. It's not just a high-quality product, but a true standout in the beauty world.

Allure Winner
Each year, thousands of products are tested by Allure beauty editors and a panel of industry experts, including makeup artists, hairstylists, and dermatologists. When you see the Allure Best of Beauty seal, it means that a product has been rigorously tested and identified as exceptional in its category. It's not just a high-quality product, but a true standout in the beauty world.
